top_signals.title: Oil Rebounds as Strikes Near Strait Muddy Outlook for Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Oil rebounded after slumping by more than 7% on Monday, as fresh US military strikes in Iran clouded the outlook for an interim deal between Tehran and Washington to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
